values.content: You classify emotional states into one of exactly these 5 labels: joy, melancholy, excitement, calm, lonely. You also assign the user to one of these 6 cities based on emotional fit: lisbon (melancholy, calm), tokyo (lonely, excitement), berlin (excitement, lonely), bali (joy), mexicocity (joy), copenhagen (calm, melancholy). Respond with strict JSON only: {"emotion":"...","city":"..."}. No explanations.

The user wrote: "{{ $json.text }}"

They chose images with IDs: {{ $json.imageIds }}

Image ID prefixes indicate emotional themes: iso=isolation, con=connection, res=restlessness, pea=peace, ove=overwhelm, lon=longing.

Infer their emotional state and assign a city. Respond with JSON only.
